title: The Silent Web Server
problem: Users report the website is down. Connection refused on port 80.

investigations.systemctl status nginx:
● nginx.service - A high performance web server
   Active: inactive (dead)
investigations.curl localhost: curl: (7) Failed to connect to localhost port 80: Connection refused

resolution: Nginx service restored. Website is back online.
hints: Check if nginx is running with systemctl status.

title: Permission Denied Crisis
problem: Developers cannot update the website. 'Permission denied' when writing to /var/www/html.
resolution: Ownership and permissions adjusted. Write access restored.
hints: Use chown or chmod to fix access.

title: Disk Full Disaster
problem: The system is sluggish and logs are failing. Monitoring shows /dev/sda1 at 100%.

investigations.df -h:
Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use% Mounted on
/dev/sda1        20G   20G     0 100% /

resolution: Large log file cleared. Disk space reclaimed.
hints: Use df -h to confirm disk usage.
Find the culprit in /var/log using du -sh.

title: Provision New Developer
problem: New hire 'sarah' needs a user account with sudo access and a home directory.
fix_commands: sudo useradd -m sarah && sudo usermod -aG sudo sarah
resolution: User 'sarah' created and added to the sudo group.
hints: Use useradd or adduser to create the account.
Use usermod to add her to the sudo group.

title: Configure Log Archival
problem: The /var/www/html/backup.tar.gz file needs to be moved to the /mnt/storage/backups directory.
resolution: Backup file moved successfully to long-term storage.
hints: Use the 'mv' command to move the file.

title: Patch System Security
problem: Weekly maintenance: Update the package list and upgrade only the 'openssh-server' package.
fix_commands: sudo apt update && sudo apt install --only-upgrade openssh-server
resolution: OpenSSH server updated to the latest security patch.
hints: Use '--only-upgrade' to target a specific package.

title: Schedule Backup Job
problem: Management wants /etc/nginx backed up to /backup/nginx.tar.gz every day at midnight.
resolution: Cron job successfully scheduled for daily midnight backups.
hints: Use 'crontab -e' or pipe a string into 'crontab -'.
The format is 'min hour day month dow command'.

title: Network Audit
problem: Security needs a list of all currently listening TCP ports on this server.

investigations.ss -tulnp:
Netid State Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address:Port ...
tcp LISTEN 0 128 0.0.0.0:80 ...
tcp LISTEN 0 128 0.0.0.0:22 ...

hints: Redirect the output to the specified file.

title: Website Down: Multi-Stage Recovery
problem: The website is showing a '500 Internal Server Error'. Nginx is running, but something is wrong behind the scenes.

investigations.tail /var/log/nginx/error.log: connect() failed (111: Connection refused) while connecting to upstream: http://127.0.0.1:3306

resolution: Nginx was OK, but the Backend Database was down. MySQL started.
hints: Check Nginx error logs for clues.
If it's a 500 error, check backend services like database or app server.
